name: Union AI
description: Managed Flyte platform for production-grade ML and data workflow orchestration from the creators of the open-source Flyte project.

seo.title: Union AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Union AI: Managed Flyte platform for production-grade ML and data workflow orchestration from the creators of the open-source Flyte project.

when_to_use: Orchestrating ML workflows at scale using Flyte and Union Cloud
Running reproducible ML training jobs with typed artifact tracking
Managing cross-cloud compute for distributed ML pipeline execution
Deploying ML workflows from local Flyte dev to production cluster

pros: Built by the Flyte creators themselves
Strong typing and caching for ML pipelines
review.verdict: The right choice if you already love Flyte; otherwise Prefect or Dagster usually have a gentler onramp.
review.best_for: ML platform teams running typed, reproducible pipelines on Kubernetes at scale
review.not_for: Small data teams wanting a lightweight Pythonic orchestrator

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
